step_rationale: Apoptotic microparticles; expose phosphatidylserine for coagulation amplification and thrombus formation.
mechanism: Annexin V-binding microparticles provide a procoagulant surface promoting thrombus formation in acute coronary syndromes.

references.title: Small-size circulating microparticles in acute coronary syndromes: relevance to fibrinolytic status, reparative markers and outcomes.
